title: CBM Mentor Application
description: Apply to become a volunteer business mentor with Cleveland Business Mentors. Share your expertise and help entrepreneurs in Northeast Ohio grow their businesses.

fields.label: Preferred Name
fields.placeholder: Name you prefer to be called (if different from first name)

fields.label: Personal Email Address
fields.description: Please use your personal email address, not a work address. This will be used for all CBM onboarding communications.

fields.label: Professional Bio / Work Experience
fields.placeholder: Describe your professional background, career history, and areas of business expertise. Include industries you have worked in and key roles you have held.

fields.label: Industry Experience and Expertise
fields.description: Select all industry sectors where you have professional experience.

choices.text: Mining, Quarrying, and Oil and Gas Extraction
choices.value: Mining, Quarrying, and Oil and Gas Extraction

choices.text: Real Estate and Rental and Leasing
choices.value: Real Estate and Rental and Leasing

choices.text: Administrative and Support and Waste Management
choices.value: Administrative and Support and Waste Management

fields.label: Languages Spoken Fluently
fields.description: Select all languages in which you can conduct a mentoring session.

choices.text: TBD — Language list to be defined by CBM Leadership

fields.note: IMPLEMENTATION NOTE: Language list values must be defined before go-live.

fields.label: Why Are You Interested in Mentoring?
fields.placeholder: Tell us what motivates you to volunteer as a business mentor and what you hope to contribute to the entrepreneurs you work with.

fields.label: How Did You Hear About CBM?

choices.text: TBD — Values to be defined by CBM Leadership

fields.note: IMPLEMENTATION NOTE: Referral source values must be defined before go-live.

fields.label: Felony Conviction Disclosure
fields.description: Have you ever been convicted of a felony?

fields.label: Terms & Conditions
fields.description: Please review the CBM Terms & Conditions before submitting your application.

choices.text: I have read and agree to the Cleveland Business Mentors Terms & Conditions

inputs.label: I have read and agree to the Cleveland Business Mentors Terms & Conditions
inputs.name: terms_accepted

fields.validation_message: You must accept the Terms & Conditions to submit your application.

fields.content: Your application will be reviewed by our team. We will contact you at the email address provided with next steps. All information submitted is kept confidential.

1.name: Default Confirmation
1.message:
Thank you for applying to become a CBM mentor!

We have received your application and will be in touch shortly. Our team reviews applications on a rolling basis and typically follows up within 5–7 business days.

If you have questions in the meantime, please contact us at info@clevelandbusinessmentors.org.

1.name: Admin Notification
1.subject: New CBM Mentor Application — {Name (First):1.3} {Name (Last):1.6}

2.name: Applicant Confirmation
2.subject: We received your mentor application — Cleveland Business Mentors
2.message:
Dear {Name (First):1.3},

Thank you for applying to become a volunteer business mentor with Cleveland Business Mentors. We are excited to learn more about your background and experience.

What happens next:
- Our team will review your application
- We may reach out to schedule a brief conversation
- If approved, you will be guided through our onboarding process

This process typically takes 5–7 business days. If you have questions, please contact us at info@clevelandbusinessmentors.org.

Warm regards,
The Cleveland Business Mentors Team
